absorption: Significant BID absorption is observed around 61280-61300. Despite strong negative delta (-70, -679), sellers are unable to push the price lower.
dom_observation: A large stacked bid wall of over 2100 contracts is defending the 61300 level, absorbing aggressive sellers.
reasoning: Aggressive sellers are being absorbed by large passive buyers at a key support level, indicating a high probability of a short-term reversal.
